summary.en: Lithium cells, batteries, and battery modules shipped to Senegal are normally handled through international dangerous-goods rules used by carriers, ports, airlines, and freight forwarders. UN Manual of Tests and Criteria subsection 38.3 test evidence, battery classification, packing instructions, labels, and the test summary are practical transport prerequisites even when the Senegal project approval itself is separate.
summary.zh: 运往塞内加尔的锂电芯、电池和电池模块通常按承运人、港口、航空公司和货运代理使用的国际危险货物规则处理。UN《试验和标准手册》第38.3小节测试证据、电池分类、包装说明、标签和测试概要是实际运输前提，即使塞内加尔项目批准本身另行处理。
summary.zht: 運往塞內加爾的鋰電芯、電池和電池模組通常按承運人、港口、航空公司和貨運代理使用的國際危險貨物規則處理。UN《試驗和標準手冊》第38.3小節測試證據、電池分類、包裝說明、標籤和測試概要是實際運輸前提，即使塞內加爾項目批准本身另行處理。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, subsection 38.3
UN Model Regulations dangerous-goods lithium battery provisions
Carrier, port, airline, and freight-forwarder dangerous-goods acceptance rules

summary.en: China exporters commonly prepare UN 38.3 reports, MSDS/SDS, dangerous-goods transport identification, and packing evidence for lithium batteries. China GB safety reports and UN 38.3 transport reports serve different purposes and should both be present where relevant.
summary.zh: 中国出口商通常为锂电池准备UN 38.3报告、MSDS/SDS、危险货物运输鉴定和包装证据。中国GB安全报告与UN 38.3运输报告用途不同，适用时应同时具备。
summary.zht: 中國出口商通常為鋰電池準備UN 38.3報告、MSDS/SDS、危險貨物運輸鑑定和包裝證據。中國GB安全報告與UN 38.3運輸報告用途不同，適用時應同時具備。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 test report and test summary

gap.en: Confirm the shipped configuration: cells, modules, racks, containers, spare batteries, and any damaged or prototype units may have different transport treatment. Align UN numbers, packing instructions, state of charge limits where applicable, labels, emergency information, and French or English documents with the carrier and Senegal import route.
gap.zh: 应确认出运配置：电芯、模块、电池架、集装箱、备件电池以及任何损坏或样品件可能适用不同运输处理。应与承运人和塞内加尔进口路径核对UN编号、包装说明、适用时的荷电状态限制、标签、应急信息以及法文或英文文件。
gap.zht: 應確認出運配置：電芯、模組、電池架、集裝箱、備件電池以及任何損壞或樣品件可能適用不同運輸處理。應與承運人和塞內加爾進口路徑核對UN編號、包裝說明、適用時的荷電狀態限制、標籤、應急資訊以及法文或英文文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for regulated lithium battery transport where carrier, port, airline, maritime, customs, or dangerous-goods rules require UN 38.3 evidence; not a Senegal BESS product certificate
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory in practice for export transport acceptance of regulated lithium batteries; separate from China stationary BESS product or project standards

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 is a transport gate, not a Senegal project approval. Shipments should carry current lithium-battery dangerous-goods evidence before booking.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UN 38.3是运输门槛，不是塞内加尔项目批准。订舱前，货物应具备现行锂电池危险货物运输证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UN 38.3是運輸門檻，不是塞內加爾項目批准。訂艙前，貨物應具備現行鋰電池危險貨物運輸證據。
